[ Project ]

Agentic Coding Workflows

A public project and notes trail around controllable agent workflows, harnesses, code review, security, and maintainable AI-assisted development.

agentsdeveloper-toolsevaluationsoftware-engineering
Code Write-up

/ Case study

Problem, method, result, code, write-up, and status.

Problem

Agentic coding can generate software quickly, but speed without control creates reliability, security, and maintainability problems.

Method

Study and document agent harnesses, feedback loops, review boundaries, prompt contracts, and workflow patterns while keeping implementation habits testable.

Result

The site now exposes an agentic-coding topic path and public repository trail that can anchor outreach around AI engineering and tooling reliability.

Status

active research and tooling

LOBForecasting
